summary: Completed testing of AiSensy WhatsApp notification integration for OLL platform. All 9 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. WhatsApp templates are REAL - notifications are sent to actual phone numbers via AiSensy API.

minor.issue: EducatorApplication model had required fields (grades_comfortable, availability) without defaults causing 500 error for educators missing these fields
minor.fix_applied: Added default values to EducatorApplication model fields

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/educator/notify-not-joined/{inquiry_id} - Educator can notify student hasn't joined (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/educator/notify-not-joined/{inquiry_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent inquiry
Backend: POST /api/educator/notify-not-joined/{inquiry_id} - Returns 403 for unassigned demo
Backend: POST /api/admin/notify-not-joined/{inquiry_id} - Admin can notify student (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/admin/notify-not-joined/{inquiry_id} - Admin can notify educator (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/admin/notify-not-joined/{inquiry_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent inquiry
Backend: POST /api/notifications/send-reminders - Cron endpoint returns sent/errors arrays
Backend: Notification logs comment on inquiry
Backend: All 14 WhatsApp templates defined in server.py
Frontend: Educator login with phone 7777777777 and OTP 1111
Frontend: Educator Dashboard shows 'Not Joined?' button for assigned demos
Frontend: Clicking 'Not Joined?' button shows toast 'Student has been notified that they haven't joined yet'
Frontend: Admin Student CRM shows 'Student?' notification button
Frontend: Admin Student CRM shows 'Educator?' notification button (for demos with assigned educator)
Frontend: Clicking 'Student?' button shows toast 'Student has been notified'
Frontend: Clicking 'Educator?' button shows toast 'Educator has been notified'
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed EducatorApplication model to have default values for grades_comfortable and availability fields
/app/tests/test_whatsapp_notifications.py - Created comprehensive test file for WhatsApp notification features
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_WhatsApp_Student and TEST_NotJoined_Student inquiries for testing (archived after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp notification features fully tested and working: 1) Educator Dashboard 'Not Joined?' button - visible on demo cards when educator has assigned demos, sends notification to student via AiSensy. 2) Admin Student CRM 'Student?' button - visible on inquiry cards with demo_date and status='new', sends notification to student. 3) Admin Student CRM 'Educator?' button - visible on inquiry cards with assigned_educator_id, sends notification to educator. 4) /api/notifications/send-reminders cron endpoint - sends 1hr, 30min (offline), 10min (online) reminders. All notifications are REAL via AiSensy API.

mocked_apis.note: WhatsApp notifications are REAL - they are sent to actual phone numbers via AiSensy API. OTP verification uses test OTP 1111 for testing purposes.

Educator_NotJoined_Button.details: On educator dashboard, when educator has assigned demos, 'Not Joined?' button appears on demo cards. Clicking sends WhatsApp notification to student via AiSensy 'Class started still not joined' template.

Admin_Student_Notification_Button.details: On Admin Student CRM, 'Student?' button (amber/yellow) appears on inquiry cards with demo_date and status='new'. Clicking sends WhatsApp notification to student.

Admin_Educator_Notification_Button.details: On Admin Student CRM, 'Educator?' button (orange) appears on inquiry cards with assigned_educator_id. Clicking sends WhatsApp notification to educator.

Send_Reminders_Cron_Endpoint.details: POST /api/notifications/send-reminders endpoint works. Sends 1hr reminder (all demos), 30min reminder (offline only), 10min reminder (online only). Returns {sent: [], errors: []} response.

WhatsApp_Templates_Defined.details: All 14 WhatsApp templates defined: student_demo_confirmed_online/offline, student_reminder_1hr/30min_offline/10min_online, student_not_joined, student_session_complete, and corresponding educator templates.

whatsapp_templates_verified: student_reminder_1hr - Reminder 1 hour prior Student Demo Confirmation
student_reminder_30min_offline - Reminder 30 min before Offline class
student_reminder_10min_online - Reminder 10 min before Online class
student_not_joined - Class started still not joined
educator_reminder_1hr - Reminder 1 hour prior Teacher Demo Confirmation
educator_reminder_30min_offline - Reminder 30 min Teacher before Offline class
educator_reminder_10min_online - Reminder 10 min Teacher before Online class
educator_not_joined - Class started still not joined educator
